data.label: Taro
data.description: Taro 是一个开放式跨端跨框架解决方案，支持使用 React/Vue/Nerv 等框架来开发微信/京东/百度/支付宝/字节跳动/QQ/飞书/快手小程序、H5、React Native 等应用。

data.label: Taro
data.description: Taro is an open cross-platform, cross-framework solution that supports using React/Vue/Nerv to develop WeChat/JD/Baidu/Alipay/Bytedance/QQ/Feishu/Kuaishou mini programs, H5, React Native, and other applications.
